---
title: "Group Members"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: pis
    contents: "members/pis/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "order asc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  
  - id: postdocs
    contents: "members/postdoc/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "title asc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: phds
    contents: "members/phds/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "title asc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    
  - id: interns
    contents: "members/interns/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "title asc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    
  - id: alumni
    contents: "members/alumnis/*.qmd"
    type: default
    image-align: left
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    sort: "title asc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

<style>
  /* Target the exact image class Quarto uses */
  .quarto-listing-default .thumbnail-image {
    width: 150px !important; 
    height: 150px !important; 
    object-fit: cover !important;
    
    /* Anchor the crop to the top center so heads don't get cut off */
    object-position: top center !important; 
    
    border-radius: 8px !important;
  }
  
  /* Force the container to respect new width and add spacing */
  .quarto-listing-default .thumbnail {
    flex-basis: 150px !important;
    max-width: 150px !important;
    margin-right: 2rem !important;
  }

  /* Vertically center the image/text AND add space at the bottom */
  .quarto-listing-default .quarto-post {
    align-items: center !important;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem !important; /* Pushes the line away from the image */
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;  /* Adds space before the next person */
  }
</style>

:::: {style='margin-top: 3em;'}
::::

## Principal Investigators (PIs)
:::{#pis}
:::

## Postdoctoral Researchers
:::{#postdocs}
:::

## PhD Students
:::{#phds}
:::

## Interns
:::{#interns}
:::

## Alumni
:::{#alumnis}
:::
